mapper.insert: insert into `featured_company` (name, type, scope, phone) values(#{name}, #{type}, #{scope}, #{phone})
mapper.update: update `featured_company` set name = #{name}, type = #{type}, scope = #{scope}, phone = #{phone} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from `featured_company`
AND MATCH(`name`, `scope`) AGAINST(#{name} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE)
AND `type` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{type}, '%')
